No technical details, analogies, or conversational transitions are omitted or altered in meaning. Redundancy is appropriately managed, and the explanation of temporary vs. permanent memory in AI is clearly and concisely maintained. The translation stands as a complete and faithful representation of the source material.

evaluation.overall_comment:
The translation is of excellent quality, successfully conveying both the technical precision and the conversational warmth of the original French podcast into fluent, professional Spanish. Technical terminology is accurately localized, complex concepts are made accessible through well-adapted analogies, and the dialogue structure remains engaging and logically coherent. The only minor imperfection is a stray editorial note at the very end, which does not impact the substantive or linguistic quality. This translation is publication-ready for a Spanish-speaking tech audience and scores highly across all evaluated criteria under the high-quality tier (18-20). A comprehensive and precise rendering that fully meets professional translation standards.
